response: A supervisor in a primary care clinic setting needs to praise a medical technician for a letter of appreciation provided by an external stakeholder. The letter of appreciation stated: "Between August 2023 and October 21, 2023, [Military Rank] [Last Name] volunteered on the committee organizing the Tri-Mess Battle of the Bands event. Their hard work, experience, and enthusiasm were essential in the committee's efforts in planning and running the event—which both supported the morale and welfare of the members of [Base Name] as well as promoted a positive relationship in the community by accepting donations to the Partners in Mission Food Bank. Their expertise and services as PMC for the Junior Ranks Mess were an essential function to the success of the event."
